channel.title: +Demographics on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Demographics on Vishvas's notes

item.title: 01 Sources and anecdotes
item.description: Secondary sources India JK Bajaj video. 2011 JK Bajaj presentation, with district level heat-maps [SS15]. muslim heat map - IMG. Christian heat map - IMG. The demographic seige. K Elst. Sachar comittee report. Bengal growth here. World pew2015. Primary sources District level fertility rate pdf1. Live birth registration stats : archive. Fudging of census data Census data show that Christian population DROPPED by 5% in AP between 2011 and 2001 (1129784/1,181,917).

item.title: 02 Abe incentives
item.description: “Directly taking on the popular Family Planning slogan ‘Small Family, Happy Family’, the Syro-Malabar Church (SMC), the country’s largest Catholic Church with 3.6 million members, has come out with its own slogan: ‘Large Family, Happy Family’.” Paid 10k+ for having 5+ children. [TOI] Muslims Zakir Naik [TW]

item.title: 03 Projected changes
item.description: The situation: the rapidly increasing proportion of Abrahamists in India (and more broadly, worldwide), leading to Hindu composition falling below the 50% mark at least before 2100 (see GS) if we fail to respond. How should hindus respond? The effect of polygamy “In other words, the more sister-wives a Mormon woman had, the fewer children she was likely to produce.” (G). Some claim: “Religion will be a lot less important in the future (50 years from now)”.

item.title: 05 Actual response of hindus
item.description: Superior response strategy consider elsewhere. Bishnois don’t cut down trees or kill animals (PJ, FV), they don’t let in outsiders into their villages (especially muslims). They have high TFR (anecdotes). This can be contrasted by some brahmanas selling agrahara lands to muslims for money in TN (who overpay to get a foothold - via R). sindhi and gujarAti traders are spread through out the world.
